flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hopkinsville Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hopkinsville Community College rose 61% between 2006 and 2009 (11.5% → 18.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hopkinsville Community College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Hopkinsville Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (54.3% → 65.8%).
